caption:
Neon rain slicked the chrome streets, but my skin burned with summer heat. 💦✨ I adjusted my holographic bikini, the metallic shimmer catching every alleyway's glow. As a bio-synthetic courier, this season's heatwave meant deliveries were just as dangerous as they were alluring. A sleek, chrome-edged hover-bike drifted past, its rider tossing a data-slab my way. Sparks flew as I caught it, the warmth seeping through my fingertips. The bike's engine hummed, a low purr vibrating against my thighs. I leaned against the wall, letting the heat roll over me, the tight material of my suit hugging my curves as I breathed in the ozone-laced air. 

Suddenly, a shadow fell across my path. A tall, synthetic man with glowing circuitry along his neck smiled, his eyes locked on my form. 'You're hotter than the last delivery,' he rasped, voice distorted by static. I tilted my head, watching his reflection ripple in a puddle beneath a flickering holographic sign. The air crackled with potential—was this a transaction, or a tease? I smiled back, biting my lip as the heat of the summer city wrapped around us both. The data-slab in my hand pulsed like a heartbeat, promising more secrets than I could possibly carry.

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonDesire #DigitalRomance #FutureLust #TechBabe #HoloHeist #CyberErotica
